name: OpenWatchParty (Develop)
description: Watch movies together in sync with friends on Jellyfin
overview: Rolling development build of OpenWatchParty, rebuilt automatically from the develop branch. Unstable — for testers only.

versions.changelog:
feat(client): move host-bridge picker into the in-player widget, open to all users

Relocates the Fladder-as-host bridge picker from the Jellyfin admin config
page into the same lobby panel used to create/join a room, so it's where
users actually look for it. Drops the RequiresElevation gate on the
/OpenWatchParty/Bridge/* endpoints in favor of plain [Authorize] — any
logged-in user can now see active sessions and start/stop a bridge, per
explicit sign-off that this info isn't considered private in this
deployment. Adds src/clients/jellyfin-web/ui/bridge.js and updates every
place the injected-client file list is duplicated (common.just, ci.yml,
publish.yml) so the new module actually ships.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
